name: ritual-dapp-frontend
description: Build production React/Next.js frontends for Ritual Chain dApps with async precompile transaction state machines, on-chain event subscriptions, and wagmi/viem wallet integration.

interface.shortDescription: Build production React/Next.js frontends for Ritual Chain dApps with async precompile transaction state machines, on-chain event subscriptions, and wagmi/viem wallet integration.
interface.longDescription: Scaffold Ritual chain and wagmi config, wire wallet connection, then track async precompile jobs through their nine-state machine via on-chain event hooks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Ritual dApp Frontend safely.
